Explore Our Programs

Find the ideal specialized career program to guarantee placement in corporate banking.

PGCRBF Program

Post Graduate Certificate in Retail Banking & Finance. Designed to prepare graduates for target roles in customer service, transactions management, sales, and retail bank portfolios.

AVERAGE SALARY RANGE ₹ 2.4 to 3.5 LPA
DURATION 90 Days / 90 Hours
Know More Enquire

PGCRBO Program

Post Graduate Certificate in Retail Banking Operations. A comprehensive operational course tailored for graduates aiming for non-sales corporate roles inside banks.

AVERAGE SALARY RANGE ₹ 2.4 to 3.5 LPA
DURATION 90 Days / 90 Hours
Know More Enquire

Sales Officer Program

Specialized Sales Training for Banking. A focused program that trains you in banking product sales, cross-selling, customer acquisition, and relationship management for field sales roles.

AVERAGE SALARY RANGE ₹ 2.4 to 3.5 LPA
DURATION 90 Days / 90 Hours
Know More Enquire

Interview Expert Program

Crack Any Banking Interview. Intensive mock interview preparation, HR round coaching, domain knowledge drills, and communication skills training to ace banking recruitment panels.

GUARANTEED 100% Placement Assistance
DURATION Short-term Intensive
Know More Enquire

What Makes TrueKnack Unique

TrueKnack offers a promising employment landscape, as blue-chip banks consistently hire our trained talent.

ISO 9001:2015 Certified Institute

NSDC Approved Training Partner

Training by Ex Senior Bankers

Interactive Training Sessions

Doubt Clearing Sessions

Latest Syllabi as per Banking Industry

NISM VA Exam Preparation

100% Placement Assistance
